notes: M7 (scene persistence + authoring layer) IN PROGRESS — 2/9, active /goal 'Implement Milestone M7'. Gate-green (404 files / 2262 tests) @ 2f1f6b50. Implement M7 in task-number order T1..T9. M7-T2 DONE (2f1f6b50): hierarchy accessor surfaced on ApertureSystemContext as this.hierarchy — children(ref)/setParent(child, parent|null)/despawnRecursive(ref) in NEW packages/app/src/systems/hierarchy.ts (createHierarchyAccess), resolving EcsEntityRef->Entity through the shared generation-checked resolveActiveEntity EXTRACTED to packages/app/src/entities/lookup/resolve.ts (barrel-free so the accessor reuses it without a context import cycle; mutation.ts now consumes it too). setParent wraps the M7-T1 world-preserving reparent and maps cycle/missing-/invalid-world-transform -> structured aperture.hierarchy.* lookup diagnostics. createApertureEntityHierarchy (entities/lookup/hierarchy.ts) now PREFERS the Children index when any active entity carries it: assembles the tree from LocalTransform participants via the authoritative index (O(subtree)) with a Parent-bucketing fallback for no-Children subtrees (glTF replay) — no full ALL-entities scan; the legacy collectActiveEntities full-scan remains the fallback for no-Children worlds. Accessor + Children re-exported through systems.ts; this.hierarchy exposed on the system base. All 3 Done-when via test/app/hierarchy-accessor.test.ts (this.hierarchy.setParent preserves the child world transform + updates the published parent ref; despawnRecursive drops the next snapshot's meshDraws by the subtree mesh count; Children path == legacy tree WITHOUT calling collectActiveEntities via vi.spyOn) + cycle/stale-ref diagnostics. M7-T1 DONE (c1509d62): bidirectional transform hierarchy — packages/simulation/src/transform/hierarchy.ts setParent (world-preserving reparent, Bevy reparented_to) + getChildren + despawnRecursive + cycle rejection; NEW derived Children component (JSON index:generation refs) registered in registerTransformComponents, Parent stays authoritative; proven by test/transform/hierarchy.test.ts. NEXT M7-T3 (simulation, M, depends none): generic headless-safe component (de)serialization codec in packages/simulation/src/serialization/ — schema-driven serializeEntityComponents/deserializeEntityComponents via a component.id->component registry, Entity-typed fields as stable index:generation tokens, WorldTransform excluded (derived); unblocks M7-T4 (scene save/load) + M7-T5 (prefab). M3 (render graph) COMPLETE 7/7 prior (commits 7d890b57/9acbfdb2/3349eb9a/2a12985b/2f3474b8 — ships behind useFrameGraph; CI green: workspace check + SwiftShader E2E). M1/M2/M4/M5 also complete.
